subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that, through divine providence and heavenly bounty, thou didst hearken unto the Call of God and attain unto faith in Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت ربانی و فضل رحمانی ندای الهی را شنیدی و بایمان باو فائز گشتی
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
